title: Wave 4 — MCP server and tool boundary
goal: Expose the existing Compass MCP Guard backend core through a first-party MCP server/tool boundary before adding more mutating flows.

context.whyNow: After Wave 3.5, the active backend is a clean guard core but has no agent-facing entrypoint. Existing swap/conditional/signer work should wait until agents can only reach guarded tools through Compass.

tasks.title: Define MCP tool contracts
tasks.description: Create dedicated contracts/types for Compass MCP tools, registry entries, tool-call input, and stable tool-call results. Keep types separate from behavior.

evidence.result: RED as expected: focused Wave 4 MCP tests collected and failed because back/services/mcp contracts, registry, and router modules did not exist yet (8 failed / 0 passed).
GREEN: full backend suite passed after adding separated MCP contracts plus pure registry/router implementation (93 tests / 9 files passing).

tasks.title: Implement first-party tool registry
tasks.description: List the initial Compass-controlled tools: quote/read, guarded transfer, deny-only direct signing. Ensure tools/list cannot expose raw signer or legacy chat tools.

evidence.result: GREEN focused MCP suite passed; registry lists exactly get_usdc_sol_quote, guarded_transfer_sol, and sign_and_send_transaction, with no raw signer/private-key tools exposed.

tasks.title: Implement pure tools/call router
tasks.description: Route calls through classification, policy/transfer gateway, result builders, and audit behavior without adding MCP transport complexity first.

evidence.result: GREEN focused router tests passed for quote ALLOW, transfer REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL via evaluateTransferGateway, direct signing DENY, unknown mutating DENY, invalid transfer REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT, audit ids, and no raw transaction leaks in results.

tasks.title: Add backend tests for MCP decisions
tasks.description: Cover ALLOW quote, REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL transfer, DENY direct signing, DENY unknown mutating tool, invalid transfer input, and no legacy imports.

evidence.result: GREEN full backend regression suite passed: 93 tests / 9 files.
PASS with existing warning only in app/layout.tsx react-refresh/only-export-components; 0 errors.
PASS: TypeScript completed with no errors.

tasks.title: Add local MCP server entrypoint
tasks.description: Add the minimal server/transport wrapper once pure registry/router tests are green. Keep it local/dev-only until demo evidence exists.

evidence.result: RED as expected: focused MCP server tests collected and failed because back/services/mcp/mcpServer.ts did not exist yet (4 failed / 1 no-legacy scan passed).

GREEN: local MCP server entrypoint tests passed after adding thin Server/Stdio transport wiring, testable handlers, Compass-result-to-MCP content mapping, safe structured transport errors, and no-legacy import coverage (5 tests / 1 file).
GREEN: focused Wave 4 MCP suites passed with registry, router, and server entrypoint coverage (13 tests / 3 files).
PASS: TypeScript completed with no errors after SDK integration and MCP server handler typing fixes.
PASS: full backend Vitest suite passed after T5 local MCP server entrypoint (10 files, 98 tests).
PASS with existing warning only in app/layout.tsx react-refresh/only-export-components; 0 errors.

tasks.title: Document manual MCP evidence
tasks.description: Record how to run tools/list and tools/call locally, including one allow, one require-approval, and one deny outcome.

evidence.command: node --input-type=module <<'NODE' ... StdioClientTransport({ command: 'npm', args: ['run', '--silent', 'mcp:dev'] }) ... client.listTools(); client.callTool(get_usdc_sol_quote); client.callTool(guarded_transfer_sol); client.callTool(sign_and_send_transaction); NODE
evidence.result: PASS: local MCP stdio server returned tools/list with get_usdc_sol_quote, guarded_transfer_sol and sign_and_send_transaction; tools/call returned ALLOW for get_usdc_sol_quote with auditId and quote data, REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL for guarded_transfer_sol with approvalRequired true and auditId, DENY for sign_and_send_transaction with DIRECT_SIGN_AND_SEND_BLOCKED and auditId; rawTransaction sentinel did not leak.

tasks.title: Validate and review
tasks.description: Run npm run test:back, npm run lint, npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false, and a fresh reviewer before merging into release/compass_migration.

evidence.command: npm run test:back && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
evidence.result: PASS: full backend Vitest suite passed (10 files, 98 tests); ESLint passed with 0 errors and 1 existing app/layout.tsx react-refresh warning; TypeScript no-emit completed cleanly.

GO: reviewer found no blockers for Wave 4 T1-T6. Confirmed local MCP stdio entrypoint, tools/list, tools/call ALLOW/REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL/DENY outcomes, no legacy imports, direct signing denied, no raw tx leakage, no upstream passthrough, durable audit intentionally deferred. Non-blocking hygiene: doc churn should be split or reverted; tmp/ ignored; manual evidence doc added.

acceptanceCriteria: MCP tool registry lists only Compass-controlled tools for this wave.
tools/call produces ALLOW, REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL, and DENY outcomes through the existing guard primitives.
guarded_transfer_sol uses evaluateTransferGateway rather than legacy chat orchestration.
direct signing/raw send calls are denied fail-closed.
No active module imports from legacy/.
Backend tests cover the first-party MCP router behavior.
verification: Manual MCP evidence once the server entrypoint exists
